title: Back-up management
excerpt: Hi there, regards. I write to clear a doubt. There is a way to manage back-ups. Or rather, is there a way to go back to a previous version of the boards in use? have the possibility to return to the boards as they were y…

posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, regards. I write to clear a doubt. There is a way to manage back-ups. Or rather, is there a way to go back to a previous version of the boards in use? have the possibility to return to the boards as they were yesterday, last week or last month? Any related information you have would help me a lot. Thank you so much.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Isrrael,

At this time, we do not currently offer a feature that allows you to revert a board to its previous versions automatically, you would need to refer to the activity log and manually make those changes in order to achieve this - I apologise for the setback here

We encourage you to vote on the existing feature request here → Undo/ Restore Board to a certain time to put greater emphasis on this need!
